params.name: Perseus and Medusa
params.description:
On Nov 29, 1540 AD, Cellini created this bronze statue.
Perseus and Medusa is a bronze sculpture made by the Italian sculptor Cellini, which depicts the image of the ancient Greek hero Perseus. Legend has it that this son of Zeus embarked on a journey after completing the trial of slaying Medusa, and, using his ingenuity, obtained several treasures, with which he completed his task and became a world-famous hero. The sculpture depicts the moment of his accomplishment, with the hero holding th …
